name: Barley Pilaf
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Fat-free Vegetarian Broth, Chicken Flavor
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, bring broth and 6 oz water to a boil over high heat.
2. Add barley and reduce heat to low, stirring occasionally until the barley is tender and the liquid is absorbed, about 45 minutes.
3. In a large skillet, sauté onions and celery in 2 tbsp water for about 2 minutes over medium-high heat.
4. Add mushrooms and continue to sauté for 3 minutes to release juices.
5. Stir in 1/4 cup water, diced apple, raisins, and white pepper; simmer until apples are soft, about 20 minutes.
6. Stir the barley into the apple mixture and simmer for an additional 3 minutes to blend flavors.
7. Remove from heat, stir in honey and lemon juice, fluff with a fork, replace the lid, and let stand for a few minutes before serving.
8. Just before serving, sprinkle the pilaf with fresh parsley and garnish with freshly cut red apple wedges, if desired.
(Note: This recipe is quite good and will definitely be made again.)
